calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar Dec-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:35 am and concluding at 9:40 am.

Plaintiff Capital One Bank N.A appearing represented by Chris Danna, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant David Nguyen not appearing.

Plaintiff's counsel makes an oral motion to waive the appearance of the witness and a motion shortening time on the motion to waive the appearance of the witness.

The Court GRANTS Plaintiff's Oral Motions.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff Capital One Bank N.A submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Declaration of Marua Hinton

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank N.A, and against Defendant David Nguyen, as follows:

1. Damages: $31,593.52
2. Costs: $554.08

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $32,147.60

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
